final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of Korean cafe-style coffee and desserts, smartphone-shot aesthetic for Instagram, no people.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Instagram story aesthetic, magazine rough-note style
Composition: 
Subject: coffee and desserts, Korean cafe style
Scene/backdrop: Korean cafe interior
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）
Constraints: no people, add hand-drawn annotations with white thin sketch lines, one-stroke rough uneven style, outline contours around objects, arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance, short diary-like comments about taste/temperature/mood for drinks, texture/flavor for food, atmosphere for space, one-line summary for overall, decorative elements like steam/sparkles/hearts/emoji moderately with white space
Avoid: excessive decoration, cluttered layout
